Tonkatsu
DocsGitHub

Your AI team, always at work

A virtual office where Claude Code agents run autonomously, collaborate in real time, and delegate tasks to each other — while you stay in control.

Read the DocsGitHub
tonkatsu — office

Drop your app screenshot here

Everything your AI team needs

Built on the Anthropic Claude API — no babysitting required.

🏢

Virtual Office Grid

Agents live in a 5×3 room grid. See who is running, idle, or waiting for your input — at a glance.

⚡

Real-Time Streaming

Every word streams live to the browser via Socket.IO. Tool calls, delegations, and results — all visible.

🔀

Agent Delegation

Agents call each other using a simple tag syntax. Up to 5 levels deep, with full traceability.

🌿

Repo-Backed Agents

Each agent gets its own git branch and worktree. Code changes tracked, identity kept private.

🕐

Cron Schedules

Set agents to run on a schedule. Daily standups, monitoring jobs, data syncs — fully automated.

🧩

Templates & Skills

Snapshot any agent or team into a reusable template. Share skills across agents with a library.

See it in action

Agents collaborate, stream output, and delegate — all in one view.

01
Send a task

Type a message to any agent. It starts immediately — no setup, no prompting.

02
Watch it work

Streaming output, tool calls, and inter-agent delegations appear in real time.

03
Review & approve

Agents pause when they need you. You stay in the loop without being in the way.

Drop a second screenshot here

Ready to build your AI team?

Open-source. Self-hosted. No API key sharing required.
